name: Sweet Potato
summary: An orange-fleshed root whose beta-carotene makes it one of the best plant sources of vitamin A, with gut-friendly fiber.

benefits.claim: Outstanding source of vitamin A (as beta-carotene)
benefits.mechanism: The orange pigment is beta-carotene, which the body converts to vitamin A — essential for vision (it forms the light-sensing pigment in the retina), immune function, and skin cell turnover. A single sweet potato can exceed a day's vitamin A.

citations.title: Vitamin A and Carotenoids — NIH Office of Dietary Supplements (Health Professional Fact Sheet)

surprisingFacts.text: Boiling actually gives sweet potato a lower blood-sugar impact than baking or roasting, which break the starch down into more quickly-absorbed forms.
